name: Admin Finder
auth_help: api_key required (header X-API-Key or ?api_key=); legacy path token /t/{token} (demo: default_token)
trl_evidence:
v1.6.0 — TRL 5→6 uplift.
- Bundled curated wordlist (~150 paths from SecLists + OWASP CMS + vendor docs)
  via go:embed; deduped, sorted, comment-stripped at parse time.
- Per-probe: HEAD then GET fallback (for 405/400 and body sniffing on 2xx);
  follows up to 2 manual redirects; per-request 3s, total 60s, worker pool 8.
- Login-form sniffer (password / username / sign in / log in / type=password)
  with strong-signal short-circuit ("password" alone) and 2-of-N rule.
- First-hop Location preserved across follow chain so "302 to /wp-admin/login"
  classifies as present even when the followed target is 404.
- Optional ?wordlist_url= composes with sibling go-pentest-wordlists
  (cap 500 entries, 256 KiB fetch budget, SSRF-safe via go-common/safehttp).
- SCOPE_GUARD_URL env (comma list, supports *.example.com) gates which
  hosts may be probed; off when unset.
- Backward-compat: ?target= alias for ?url=.
- Tests: handler_test.go + classify_test.go + wordlist_test.go;
  httptest fake server covers 200-with-form / 302-to-login / 401 /
  200-generic / 302-to-home / 404. `go test ./...` green.
trl_ceiling_reason: Authenticated admin discovery requires site-specific credentials or session state.

name: Analyze Headers
auth_help: api_key required (header X-API-Key or ?api_key=); legacy path token /t/{token} (demo: default_token)
trl_evidence:
Full OWASP secure-header matrix: HSTS (max-age/includeSubDomains/preload),
CSP (parsed; flags unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval/wildcard/data:/http: in script-src
and style-src; checks default-src, object-src 'none', frame-ancestors), COOP,
COEP, CORP, Permissions-Policy (risky sinks parsed), Referrer-Policy,
X-Frame-Options (ALLOW-FROM deprecation), X-Content-Type-Options,
X-XSS-Protection (deprecated; flagged), Cache-Control, Server/X-Powered-By
information disclosure. SSRF-safe via go-common/safehttp; HEAD-first with
GET fallback when origin rejects HEAD. Composite grade is critical-aware:
any missing HSTS on HTTPS or missing CSP forces F. Split into headers.go,
csp.go, grade.go, handler.go; covered by handler_test.go (6 cases including
perfect-site, weak-CSP, missing-HSTS, deprecated-X-XSS) and csp_test.go (7
parser/grader cases). `go test ./...` green.

trl_evidence: 6 normalization rules with table tests (param-order, UUID-in-path, numeric IDs, timestamps, whitespace, vuln-class/host invariance); 18 tests pass; TTL reaper for expiring fingerprints.
trl_ceiling_reason: Normalization rule corpus grows with bug-class variety; current 6 rules handle the common cases.

name: Go Pentest Dependency Cve
description: CPE -> NVD JSON 2.0 + CISA KEV cross-flag. Per-request fetch (no local cache yet). Composes with go-pentest-httpx tech detection.
trl_evidence: NVD JSON 2.0 + CISA KEV cross-flag. Per-request fetch (no local CVE DB cache yet). Free, no API key.
trl_ceiling_reason: TRL 7 with local CVE feed primitive caching NVD/GHSA delta-updates.

name: Go Pentest Disclosure Policy Finder
description: Probes 12 disclosure-policy paths and classifies bounty/VDP/safe-harbor/unknown/none. Extracts Contact/PGP from security.txt and detects platform hints (HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti/YesWeHack/Synack).
trl_evidence: 12 probe paths, RFC 9116 parser, 9 bounty-platform regexes, 4 safe-harbor regexes, class-priority resolver. Extends fleet security-txt with VDP-vs-bounty classification.
trl_ceiling_reason: Add /security anchor crawl + submit-button scraping.

name: Go Pentest Exploit Verifier
description: Gate between possible-finding and submit-bot. Runs deterministic confirmation per vuln class: SSRF via OOB callback, XSS via marker reflection, IDOR via session-stripped re-fetch, JWT alg-none, open-redirect, subdomain-takeover.
trl_evidence: TRL-5 uplift 2026-05-16: introduced explicit confirmation taxonomy (verdict: confirmed|not_confirmed|inconclusive) downstream services gate on; per-verifier 10s + total 30s budgets; SSRF verifier emits TRL-5 evidence shape (callback_recorded, callback_at, raw_request) and polls oob-collector up to 5s; XSS marker matcher accepts raw + HTML-entity + URL-escaped echoes; JWT-alg-none, open-redirect, IDOR, takeover all set explicit verdicts; scope-guard fail-closed yields verdict:inconclusive (never confirmed). SQLite migration adds verdict column + idx_ver_verdict, backfills from confirmed. Tests: 12 stubbed-dependency cases incl. verdict-classification, per-verifier timeout, malformed-JWT inconclusive, encoded-XSS marker reflection. ADR docs/adr/0001-trl-uplift-to-5.md captures composition decisions. Real fleet integration (oob-collector + takeover-fingerprints + findings-store wired end-to-end) still pending.
trl_ceiling_reason: Each verifier is a thin recipe — lifts as verifier coverage grows. Bounded by OOB collector quality for blind classes.

name: Go Pentest Favicon Hash
description: Shodan-style mmh3 favicon hash with known-tech lookup (~15 seeds: Tomcat, Spring Boot, Jenkins, Grafana, Jupyter, phpMyAdmin, GitLab, FortiNet, F5, etc.).
trl_evidence: mmh3 via spaolacci/murmur3, Python-compatible base64.encodebytes (76-char wrap), embedded lookup. Tests on determinism + sensitivity.

name: Go Pentest Finding Triage
description: Auto-grades raw findings into submit_ready / needs_review / drop using 8 rules (missing fields, fingerprint-dupe, scope-deny, noise-class, confidence floor, severity promote, evidence-present, verified-class). Reasons array surfaces every decision.
trl_evidence: Pure-rule engine (8 rules) with table-driven isolated tests + integration tests stubbing scope-guard and dedup-fingerprint. Dependency-error policy: neutral with logged reason.
trl_ceiling_reason: Lift bound is rule-corpus size. Adding ML or LLM-based triage would push the ceiling but break the pure-rule explainability.

name: Go Pentest Findings Store
description: Central deduplicated findings store for the pentest fleet. SQLite-backed (pure Go modernc); collapses same finding from multiple scanners via dedup_key with seen_count.
trl_evidence: modernc.org/sqlite (pure-Go SQLite); upsert+dedup via ON CONFLICT RETURNING; tested for insert/dedup/list/filter/stats/status.
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite is fine until ~1M findings; horizontal shard or Postgres later.

name: Go Pentest Github Dorks
description: GitHub Search API dorking for leaked credentials: 31 curated patterns (AWS keys, .env, private keys, Slack/Stripe/PAT tokens, kubeconfig, npm/Docker creds). Rate-limit aware; pairs with go-pentest-trufflehog for verification.
trl_evidence: 38 curated dork patterns (creds + files + vendors + infra + k8s + per-vendor leaks); typed rate-limit handling (primary + secondary/abuse) with adaptive sleep; per-dork 4s + total 90s deadline; optional verification compose with go-pentest-trufflehog (TRUFFLEHOG_URL); domain qualifier (\"<domain>\" in:file); production mode (MODE=production) refuses to start without GITHUB_TOKEN; 19 unit tests including httptest-mocked GitHub API (success / primary rate-limit / abuse / no-results) + trufflehog compose. Pure Go (CGO-free), no parallelism. Ceiling stays at 7 pending cross-dork dedup, snippet-level secret extraction, and findings-store fan-out.
trl_ceiling_reason: GitHub Search has no regex; semantic dedup + verifier-loop integration cap the climb at 6.

name: Go Pentest Http Replay
description: Captures + reproduces HTTP request/response pairs as bug-bounty evidence. Generates canonical curl PoC, replays for diff, imports raw HTTP from Burp. Uses go-common safehttp (SSRF-safe).
trl_evidence: go-common safehttp client; 256KB response cap; sha256 body-hash for rerun diff; 19 tests pass including curl-builder edge cases.
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine for evidence retention at typical bug-bounty scale; lifts when paired with object storage for large bodies.

name: Go Pentest Httpx
description: One HTTP fingerprint per request: status, title, server, TLS cert summary, ~25 tech-detection signatures. Parallel batch with worker cap. Replaces chaining tech-stack + security-headers + cdn-detector.
trl_evidence: Single+batch probes, parallel with worker cap, TLS extract, ~25 tech-detection signatures (CDNs, frameworks, CMS, front-end libs). safehttp-protected. Tested.
trl_ceiling_reason: Wrap wappalyzergo for full 3000+ fingerprint DB.

name: Go Pentest Job Queue
description: Durable workflow queue. POST jobs, workers /claim → /complete or /fail. Crash-resilient via SQLite WAL; expired leases auto-requeue every 15s with exponential backoff. Backbone for orchestrator + continuous-monitor + every long-running scan.
trl_evidence: Atomic claim via tx (SELECT-pending → UPDATE-running); lease-expiry reaper goroutine; exp-backoff retry. Full coverage on enqueue/claim/complete/fail/retry/reap/stats.
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine up to ~10k jobs/sec; graduates to NATS JetStream or Postgres skip-locked beyond that.

name: Go Pentest Leak Bounty Policy
description: Curated registry: which bug-bounty programs PAY for credential-leak disclosures, broken down by leak class (own_employee / shared_secret / customer_cred / canary). Use BEFORE writing up a leaked-credential disclosure — most platforms treat customer-side leaks as goodwill-only; only Stripe / GitHub partner / AWS canary / GitLab pay per-leak. 25 programs seeded.
trl_evidence: 25 hand-curated programs with per-program LeakPolicy across 4 leak classes (own_employee/shared_secret/customer_cred/canary) and credential_prefixes for token classification. 7 unit tests pin: registry parses, slugs unique, prefixes unique, sk_live_ -> Stripe + canary in_scope, shpat_ -> Shopify + customer_cred out_of_scope, >=3 canary-paying programs.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling 7 with quarterly auto-refresh from each program's policy URL + admin /reload endpoint. Pure manual curation caps at 5 because policies drift faster than humans can re-audit at scale.

name: Go Pentest Notify
description: Multi-sink notification fanout for the pentest fleet (Telegram/Discord/Slack/email/webhook/ntfy/Matrix/Teams/etc.) via containrrr/shoutrrr.
trl_evidence: Wraps containrrr/shoutrrr v0.8 (20+ sinks). Default-from-env, per-request URL override, secret-hiding /sinks.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = shoutrrr sink count + HMAC webhook auth.

name: Go Pentest Nuclei
description: Nuclei wrapper: scope-guarded YAML-template scanner (cves/exposures/misconfigs/takeovers). Pre-flights every target through go-pentest-scope-guard; forwards findings to go-pentest-findings-store. Bundles nuclei binary in container.
trl_evidence: Wraps nuclei binary; scope-guard pre-flight (fail-closed); -jsonl streaming parser; best-effort findings forwarding via safehttp; 5 unit tests covering 400/405/scope-empty/templates/JSONL-parse.
trl_ceiling_reason: Pinned-binary wrapping; templates refresh cadence + concurrency stress-testing gate the climb to 7.

name: Go Pentest Oob Collector
description: Out-of-band HTTP callback catcher for blind XSS/SSRF/RCE findings. Allocates short-lived tokens, public /c/{token} catch endpoint, authenticated polling API. v0.2 wraps projectdiscovery/interactsh for DNS exfil.
trl_evidence: v0.2 uplift: UUID-v4 token allocation (POST /alloc) with TTL clamp (60s..7d), public catch endpoint (/c/<token>) with 10KiB body cap + Referer capture, cursor-paginated poll (GET /poll/<token>?since=N), SSE long-poll (/poll/<token>/stream) with replay-on-reconnect, admin-gated revoke (DELETE /token/<token>), aggregate /stats. Per-token poll bucket (1 rps, burst 2). SQLite WAL mode for concurrent writer (catch) + reader (poll). 20 tests across alloc / catch / poll / stream / revoke / stats / body-cap / expired-token / rate-limit / cursor-delta — race-clean. Designed-for-fleet hookups (xss-scanner / file-inclusion canary / crlf-tester / findings-store) documented in docs/adr/0001.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling unlocked once projectdiscovery/interactsh is wrapped for DNS+SMTP exfil. HTTP half remains useful as simple-case catcher.

name: Go Pentest Orchestrator
description: Master end-to-end pipeline. POST a campaign and the state machine drives scope→recon→scan→triage→verify→submit through every other go-pentest-* service. 30s ticker auto-advances. SUBMIT_DRY_RUN=1 by default — the unattended money loop.
trl_evidence: SQLite state machine; idempotent per-state advance; append-only event log; 30s ticker; 16 tests pass with every fleet dep stubbed (httptest mux).
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by submit-bot's platform-API stability. Once submit-bot ships TRL 8, this trails one step behind at 7-8.

name: Go Pentest Payloads
description: Serves payload corpora (XSS/SQLi/SSRF/SSTI/XXE/CRLF/NoSQLi/GraphQL/path-traversal) by class+variant. Random-sample API for taint fuzzing.
trl_evidence: 9 classes seeded with real-world payloads (xss reflected+polyglot, sqli error+time, ssrf cloud-meta+local, ssti jinja2+twig, xxe, crlf, nosqli, graphql, path-traversal). Random + filter APIs tested.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = PayloadsAllTheThings as submodule.

name: Go Pentest Payoff Tracker
description: Self-evaluator. POST /predict captures what finding-triage said before submission; POST /outcome captures what the platform did with it (via triager-listener). GET /calibration returns per-rule precision + per-program ROI. Closes the learning loop.
trl_evidence: Pure-Go SQLite, upsert prediction + outcome keyed on finding_id, LEFT JOIN-backed findings list, per-rule precision (paid / (paid+dropped)), per-program $/paid + hit-rate. Sync endpoint pulls watches from triager-listener. Unit tests cover join semantics + multi-rule firing + program-level ROI math.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling lifts once at least ~20 real submissions have flowed through and /calibration is non-empty.

name: Go Pentest Rate Coordinator
description: Global per-host token-bucket rate limiter. Every active prober calls POST /acquire {host, weight} before firing — prevents multiple scanners from collectively DDoS-ing a target.
trl_evidence: golang.org/x/time/rate (stdlib-blessed) buckets per host; tested burst, deny, distinct hosts, policy override, wait+context cancel.
trl_ceiling_reason: In-process state — single instance. Multi-instance needs Redis (sethvargo/go-limiter has the backend ready).

name: Go Pentest Report Templater

trl_evidence: 3 platform templates using stdlib text/template, custom func map (title/code/indent/add1), CVSS enrichment via go-pentest-cvss with graceful degrade. Tested for render + missing-template + per-platform output.
trl_ceiling_reason: Add org-specific templates + screenshot embed + direct HackerOne API submission.

name: Go Pentest Scope Guard
description: Hard scope check before any active prober fires. POST /check {target, program_id} -> {allowed, reason, matched_by}. Matches hostname/wildcard/CIDR/regex; exclusions always win. Legal floor of the pentest fleet.
trl_evidence: In-memory store, hostname/wildcard/CIDR/regex matchers with anchored regex cache; exclusion-wins logic; suffix-confusion regression test.
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling is whatever feeds it programs — once go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker exists, scope-guard is a CDN over its data.

name: Go Pentest Screenshot
description: Headless-Chromium screenshot evidence for pentest reports. POST /shot {url,viewport,before_js,after_js} → PNG + DOM hash + title + status. 24h SQLite cache keyed by sha256 of inputs.

trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by Chromium-headless RAM (1 GiB shm) and the fact that one container is one Chromium instance.

name: Go Pentest Triager Listener

POST /watch registers a submitted bounty report; a 15-min ticker polls HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti and records state changes (new -> triaged -> duplicate/informative/n_a/resolved). Without it the fleet cannot learn its own duplicate rate or payoff per program.
trl_evidence: SQLite-backed, idempotent on (platform, external_id), terminal-state poll skipping, state-change journal, normalized status enum across 3 platform shapes. Adapter stubs for H1/BC/Intigriti return ErrNotConfigured cleanly when tokens absent.
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by platform API stability — H1/BC/Intigriti reshape attributes regularly and there's no signed contract.

name: Go Pentest Trufflehog

Per-finding output carries detector, source(file:line), commit, redacted (first/last 4), raw_match_hash (sha256), severity. Composes with go-pentest-scope-guard (POST /check, fail-open with note), go-pentest-findings-store (POST /findings, dedup_key includes fingerprint), go-pentest-job-queue (POST /jobs at >30s estimated runtime). Hard caps: 4 concurrent scans, 5min wall-clock per scan, 1MiB request body, argv-injection-safe flag value sanitisation.
trl_ceiling_reason: Wraps upstream trufflehog binary; advancing requires custom concurrency control and deduplication.

name: Go Pentest Walkthrough
